item.title: Index
item.description: Welcome to Pype.dev 👋 Hi, I'm **Nic Payne**. This is my digital space where I share my thoughts, learnings, and explorations. Consider this my mental datal
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: dall-e.py
item.description: None

item.author: Nic Payne

item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Pandas.DataFrame info always answers and is sometimes right
item.description: TIL Today I learned that the `.info()` of a `pandas.DataFrame` will always give you an answer, but it is wildly difficult to know how accurate it is, because it
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Grafana + Gotify for push notifications
item.description: It's easy to configure push notifications through Gotify from Grafana by setting up a generic `Webhook` Alerting Contact Point... The parameters are: HTTP

item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: SMB with ZFS on Ubuntu
item.description: sudo apt-get install -y samba \\ then set sharesmb=on \\ chown the user \\ smbpasswd <user> -a \\ then mount with user/password from other machine
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Recovering from zpool corruption when you're short a drive

item.author: Nic Payne

item.description: I woke up to faulty internet and after some troubleshooting it turns out the root zfs dataset that OPNSense boots from got corrupted... PRO-TIP - Auto backup yo

item.title: Docker copy and chown
item.description: COPY --chown=myuser:mygroup source-file target-file

item.title: Refresh Nextcloud Groupfolders after messing around on the filesystem
item.description: Exec in as www-data and run ./occ groupfolders:scan folder_id -v (the -v to see what it's doing)
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: lsof to find what's using your filesystem
item.description: lsof | grep /tank/nas shows me what is using my nas at any time!
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Changing ZFS key for child datasets of encrypted dataset after migration
item.description: ➜ pihole sudo zfs load-key -L file:///path/to/.zfs.tank.key tank/encrypted/vms/arch-sandbox ➜ pihole sudo zfs change-key -o keylocation=file:///path/to/.zfs.tan
item.author: Nic Payne

item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: FFMPEG 10-bit videos to 8-bit
item.description: `ffmpeg -i input.mp4 -map 0 -c:v libx264 -vf format=yuv420p -c:a copy output.mp4`
item.author: Nic Payne

item.author: Nic Payne

item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Make a series of directories fast!
item.description: mkdir s{1..10} will make directories s1, s2, ... s10 in one command!

item.description: /mysearch\c will match mysearch, MYSEARCH, mYSeArCh...

item.title: Limit zfs list to avoid docker vomit
item.description: zfs list has a flag -r, but if you use zfs driver for docker then you'll get flooded with every docker volume in the world. zfs list -r -d N will limit the
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Use the right lspsage, you dope!

item.title: Deleting files on remote storage from Ubuntu might not do what you think
item.description: From my daily driver Ubuntu machine I often open nautilus, dolphin, etc. and delete a file here or there on my NAS... turns out Ubuntu sends thse file to `.Tras
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Nextcloud permissions with ZFS and Ansible-NAS
item.description: TL;DR As the nextcloud docs say... if you want to write to an external volume that location has to be writeable by the user/group `www-data` on the host system.
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: See ZFS snapshot disk usage
item.description: As I was cleaning up my NAS recently I noticed that I ran out of storage even though my disk usage looked pretty low... turns out I was keeping a mega-ton of ZF
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: See git history about one file
item.description: In vim `G clog %` does a `git clog {current file}`. You get every commit that the target file is apart of (so there might be info in those commits unrelated)
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Subset a list based on values in another list with itertools.compress
item.description: I have list [True, False, False, True] and another list [1, 2, 3, 4] and a use case where I want to filter list 2 based on list 1 to remove values that line up
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Remove ZFS Dataset Specific Snapshots
item.description: I started my homelab journey being super naive about ZFS and how to manage the filesystem... that bit me in the butt when transfering a ton of files out of fold
item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Plug Snapshot!
item.description: :PlugSnapshot, :w ~/dotfiles/nvim/snapshot.vim... keep your config safe with git!
item.author: Nic Payne

item.description: I've had `Plug 'hrsh7th/cmp-path'` in my plugins for ever but didn't notice until recently that I wasn't getting any filepath completio
item.author: Nic Payne

item.author: Nic Payne

item.author: Nic Payne

item.title: Plug-Snapshot-To-Save-Your-Life
item.description: If you use vim-plug for managing your vim plugins, do yourself a favor and snapshot your plugins before upgrading! `:PlugSnapshot` creates a vim.snapshot file

item.author: Nic Payne
